Value: The High Priestess – She Who Weaves Thought and Listens to Echoes Between the Curves of the Spiral and the Light of the Stars

The High Priestess does not seek to control the unknown — she partners with it. She listens where others speak. She reflects where others chase clarity. She feels the shape of the unseen and holds space for truths not yet ready to arrive.
